info.title: dotnet docs
info.description: The command-line tool that helps you manage your .NET Documentation Projects (.docsproj) and generate beautiful documentation from your XML Doc Comments.

options.name: --assembly-list
options.description: Optional. Path to assembly list file. Defaults to assembly-list.txt in current directory.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.

options.name: --output
options.description: Optional. Output directory for the docs project. Defaults to the project folder.

options.name: --name
options.description: Optional. Name for the docs project. Defaults to solution name + '.Docs'.

options.name: --solution
options.description: Optional. Path to solution file (.sln or .slnx)

options.name: --type
options.description: Optional. Documentation type (Mintlify, DocFX, MkDocs, Jekyll, Hugo, Generic). Defaults to Mintlify.

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Optional. Use the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.

options.name: --skip-solution
options.description: Optional. Skip adding the project to the solution file. Useful for CI/CD or standalone documentation projects.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version from NuGet.

options.name: --project
options.description: Optional. Project name or path to .docsproj file to update. If not specified, updates all .docsproj files in current directory.

options.name: --recursive
options.description: Optional. Search for .docsproj files recursively in subdirectories.

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Optional. Update to the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.
